      <!DOCTYPE html>
      <html lang="es">
      <head>
      <meta charset="UTF-8">
      <meta http-equiv="cache-control" content="no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate">
      <meta http-equiv="pragma" content="no-cache">
      <meta http-equiv="expires" content="1775758565">
      <meta name="version" content="1775956403">
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, viewport-fit=cover">
      <script>
      // Desregistrar cualquier Service Worker existente de forma inmediata
      if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {
      navigator.serviceWorker.getRegistrations().then(function(regs) {
      regs.forEach(function(reg) { reg.unregister(); });
      });
      }
      </script>
      <script>
      (function() {
      var VERSION = '1775956403';
      var stored = localStorage.getItem('gs_app_version');
      if (stored !== VERSION) {
      var session = localStorage.getItem('gs_session');
      var keys = Object.keys(localStorage);
      keys.forEach(function(k) { if (k !== 'gs_session' && k !== 'gs_panel_v5') localStorage.removeItem(k); });
      localStorage.setItem('gs_app_version', VERSION);
      if (session) localStorage.setItem('gs_session', session);
      if ('caches' in window) caches.keys().then(function(n){n.forEach(function(x){caches.delete(x);});});
      window.location.reload(true);
      }
      })();
      </script>
      <title>Panel de Gestión — Global Solutions</title>
      <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
      <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/[email protected]/dist/xlsx.full.min.js"></script>
      <style>
      * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
      body { font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; background: #f0f2f5; min-height: 100vh; }
      .container { max-width: 560px; margin: 0 auto; }
      .topbar { background: linear-gradient(160deg, #051525 0%, #0B2545 50%, #163A6B 100%); padding: 14px 16px 10px; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 10; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); }
      .topbar-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; }
      .topbar .label { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 3px; font-weight: 700; }
      .topbar h1 { color: white; font-weight: 800; font-size: 22px; margin: 2px 0; }
      .topbar .sub { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); font-size: 10px; }
      .copy-btn { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3); color: white; border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 10px; font-size: 10px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; margin-left: 8px; margin-top: 2px; transition: all 0.15s; }
      .copy-btn:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); }
      .copy-btn.copied { background: #375623; border-color: #375623; }
      .filters { display: flex; gap: 5px; margin-top: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
      .filter-btn { padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 20px; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-size: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); transition: all 0.15s; }
      .filter-btn.active { background: white; color: #1F4E79; font-weight: 700; }
      .content { padding: 14px 12px; }
      .kpi-banner { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1F4E79, #2E75B6); border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 14px; margin-bottom: 14px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(31,78,121,0.3); }
      .kpi-banner .result { color: white; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
      .kpi-banner .kpi { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); font-size: 10px; margin-top: 3px; }
      .fase-card { border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); margin-bottom: 14px; background: white; }
      .fase-header { padding: 12px 16px; }
      .fase-header-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
      .fase-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
      .fase-emoji { font-size: 20px; }
      .fase-num { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 1px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }
      .fase-name { color: white; font-weight: 800; font-size: 15px; }
      .fase-right { text-align: right; }
      .fase-sub { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); font-size: 10px; font-style: italic; }
      .urgentes-badge { background: #C00000; color: white; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 10px; margin-top: 3px; display: inline-block; }
      .tabs { display: flex; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; }
      .tab-btn { flex: 1; padding: 8px 4px; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-size: 11px; color: #888; background: white; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: all 0.15s; font-weight: 500; }
      .tab-btn.active { font-weight: 700; }
      .items { padding: 6px 10px 10px; }
      /* ACORDEÓN - Tareas Diarias (no tachables) */
      .acord-item { border-radius: 7px; margin-bottom: 4px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #eee; }
      .acord-header { display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 9px 10px; cursor: pointer; background: white; transition: background 0.15s; gap: 8px; user-select: none; }
      .acord-header:hover { background: #f7f9ff; }
      .acord-header.open { background: #f0f5ff; }
      .acord-arrow { font-size: 10px; color: #aaa; transition: transform 0.2s; flex-shrink: 0; }
      .acord-header.open .acord-arrow { transform: rotate(90deg); }
      .acord-title { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #222; flex: 1; }
      .acord-count { font-size: 10px; color: #aaa; background: #f0f0f0; padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; }
      .proc-icon { font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0; opacity: 0.5; }
      .proc-icon:hover { opacity: 1; }
      .acord-body { display: none; background: #fafbff; border-top: 1px solid #eef2ff; padding: 8px 10px 8px 28px; }
      .acord-body.open { display: block; }
      /* Procedimiento / ayuda de memoria */
      .proc-box { background: #fffbe6; border: 1px solid #ffe58f; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 10px; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 11px; color: #614700; line-height: 1.5; }
      .proc-box strong { display: block; margin-bottom: 4px; font-size: 11px; color: #ad6800; }
      .proc-edit-area { width: 100%; border: 1px solid #ffe58f; border-radius: 5px; padding: 6px 8px; font-size: 11px; font-family: inherit; resize: vertical; min-height: 60px; background: #fffef5; outline: none; }
      .proc-save-btn { margin-top: 4px; background: #d48806; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 11px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; }
      .subtask { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; padding: 5px 4px; border-radius: 5px; margin-bottom: 1px; }
      .subtask-text { font-size: 11px; color: #444; line-height: 1.4; flex: 1; }
      .subtask-del { font-size: 14px; color: #ddd; cursor: pointer; padding: 0 4px; flex-shrink: 0; line-height: 1.6; }
      .subtask-del:hover { color: #e55; }
      .add-sub-row { display: flex; gap: 6px; margin-top: 6px; }
      .add-sub-input { flex: 1; border: 1px solid #dde; border-radius: 5px; padding: 5px 8px; font-size: 11px; outline: none; font-family: inherit; }
      .add-sub-input:focus { border-color: var(--fc); }
      .add-sub-btn { background: var(--fc); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; padding: 5px 10px; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 700; }
      /* PENDIENTES */
      .section-label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1px; color: #aaa; padding: 6px 4px 4px; }
      .pend-item { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; padding: 7px 8px; border-radius: 7px; cursor: pointer; margin-bottom: 3px; background: white; border: 1px solid #eee; }
      .pend-item:hover { background: #fafafa; }
      .pend-item.done-pend { background: #f9f9f9; }
      .pend-check { width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 4px; border: 2px solid #ccc; background: white; margin-right: 8px; margin-top: 1px; flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: all 0.15s; cursor: pointer; }
      .pend-check.done { background: #607D8B; border-color: #607D8B; }
      .pend-check.done::after { content: '✓'; color: white; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; }
      .pend-text { font-size: 12px; color: #222; line-height: 1.4; flex: 1; }
      .pend-item.done-pend .pend-text { color: #aaa; text-decoration: line-through; }
      .pend-edit { font-size: 12px; color: #bbb; cursor: pointer; padding: 0 3px; flex-shrink: 0; align-self: center; }
      .pend-edit:hover { color: #2E75B6; }
      .pend-tach { font-size: 13px; color: #bbb; cursor: pointer; padding: 0 3px; flex-shrink: 0; align-self: center; font-weight: 700; }
      .pend-tach:hover { color: #888; }
      .pend-tach.tachado { color: #4CAF50; }
      .pend-del { font-size: 15px; color: #ddd; cursor: pointer; padding: 0 4px; flex-shrink: 0; align-self: center; }
      .pend-del:hover { color: #e55; }
      .hoy-badge { background: #C00000; color: white; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 3px; margin-right: 5px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; flex-shrink: 0; align-self: flex-start; margin-top: 2px; }
      .lunes-badge { background: #2E75B6; color: white; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 3px; margin-right: 5px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; flex-shrink: 0; align-self: flex-start; margin-top: 2px; }
      .ok-badge { background: #375623; color: white; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 3px; margin-right: 5px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; flex-shrink: 0; align-self: flex-start; margin-top: 2px; }
      .martes-badge { background: #5B3E8C; color: white; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 3px; margin-right: 5px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; flex-shrink: 0; align-self: flex-start; margin-top: 2px; }
      .miercoles-badge { background: #2E7D32; color: white; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 3px; margin-right: 5px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; flex-shrink: 0; align-self: flex-start; margin-top: 2px; }
      .jueves-badge { background: #6D4C41; color: white; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 3px; margin-right: 5px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; flex-shrink: 0; align-self: flex-start; margin-top: 2px; }
      .viernes-badge { background: #00695C; color: white; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 3px; margin-right: 5px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; flex-shrink: 0; align-self: flex-start; margin-top: 2px; }
      } else {
      b.style.display = 'none';
      }
      });
      }, 50);
      }
      }
      // ============ FIN LOGIN ============
      loadData(); iniciarLogin(); initSupabase();
      // ── AUTO-REFRESCO v37: cada 3 minutos ──────────────────
      setInterval(async () => {
      if (!supaConectado || !supa) return;
      // No interrumpir si el usuario está llenando un formulario activo
      const formulariosActivos = [
      'srv_fecha', 'srv_conductor', 'srv_patente', 'srv_cliente',
      'pip_new_cliente', 'disp_fecha', 'liq_fecha_v2',
      'ren_fecha', 'ren_responsable', 'ren_descripcion',
      'fac_numero', 'fac_monto_neto'
      ];
      const _ae2 = document.activeElement;
      const hayFormAbierto = formulariosActivos.some(id => document.getElementById(id) !== null)
      || (_ae2 && (_ae2.tagName==='INPUT'||_ae2.tagName==='TEXTAREA'||_ae2.tagName==='SELECT'));
      if (hayFormAbierto) return;
      try {
      await syncServiciosDesdeSupabase();
      await syncDisponibilidadDesdeSupabase();
      render();
      } catch(e) {}
      }, 1 * 60 * 1000); // 1 minuto
      // ── PULL TO REFRESH móvil ───────────────────────────────
      let _ptY = 0;
      document.addEventListener('touchstart', e => { _ptY = e.touches[0].clientY; }, {passive:true});
      document.addEventListener('touchend', async e => {
      const dy = e.changedTouches[0].clientY - _ptY;
      if (dy > 80 && window.scrollY === 0 && supaConectado) {
      const formulariosActivos = ['srv_fecha','srv_conductor','srv_patente','srv_cliente','pip_new_cliente','disp_fecha','liq_fecha_v2','ren_fecha','ren_responsable','ren_descripcion'];
      if (formulariosActivos.some(id => document.getElementById(id) !== null)) return;
      const el = document.getElementById('save-indicator');
      if (el) { el.textContent = '↻ Actualizando...'; el.classList.add('show'); }
      await syncServiciosDesdeSupabase();
      await syncDisponibilidadDesdeSupabase();
      render();
      if (el) { el.textContent = '✓ Actualizado'; setTimeout(() => el.classList.remove('show'), 2000); }
      }
      }, {passive:true});
      // Registrar Service Worker de auto-eliminación (limpia cachés y se desregistra solo)
      if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {
      window.addEventListener('load', function() {
      navigator.serviceWorker.register('./sw.js')
      .then(function(reg) {
      // Forzar activación inmediata si hay nuevo SW esperando
      reg.update();
      })
      .catch(function(err) { console.warn('SW:', err); });
      });
      }
      // Limpiar localStorage de servicios al arrancar — Supabase es la única fuente
      try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem('gs_panel_v5');
      if (raw) {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
      if (parsed.servicios && parsed.servicios.length > 0) {
      parsed.servicios = [];
      localStorage.setItem('gs_panel_v5', JSON.stringify(parsed));
      }
      }
      } catch(e) {}
      </script>
      </body>
      </html>
